field_docs.contract_version: Version of the Wizard-to-uHOME household networking policy payload.
field_docs.profile_id: Named household networking profile. Supported values: beacon, crypt, tomb, home.
field_docs.network_scope: Visibility and trust class of the network lane from the household point of view.
field_docs.visibility: Whether the network should be visible or hidden.
field_docs.auth_mode: Expected access mode for the network profile.
field_docs.vault_access: Vault access rule exposed to the local runtime. Current policy is local-only.
field_docs.internet_sharing: Whether the profile may share public internet. Current policy is disabled for all four profiles.
field_docs.runtime_owner: Local runtime owner that hosts household services under the policy.
field_docs.policy_owner: Repo that defines the policy and secret-backed routing behavior.
field_docs.consumer_repos: Sibling repos allowed to consume the policy artifact without taking ownership of it.
field_docs.secret_refs: Symbolic secret references only. The payload must not contain raw secret values.

beacon.notes: Visible public-facing lane with local vault access only and no internet sharing.

crypt.notes: Visible protected lane with local vault access only and no internet sharing.

tomb.notes: Hidden discovery-based lane with no public internet access.

home.notes: Household lane that may be hidden or visible, while remaining password-protected and locally hosted.
